page.content.empty_cta:
Open <1>Preview in Cloud Editor
and the project will appear here
page.footer.stream_message: Listening for projects over local network...
page.meta.title: Link Sharing Page
page.meta.description: 8th Wall Head Mount Display link sharing utility page
page.modal.help.how_it_works.title: How does this work?
page.modal.help.how_it_works.instruction:
When a developer selects “Preview” in any 8th Wall Cloud Editor project, an authenticated preview link is shared over the local network and will appear on this page. The preview link will remain on this page until the developer dismisses the “Preview” dropdown in the Cloud Editor.

If your link is not appearing here, ensure your headset is on the same local network as the device Cloud Editor is running on.
page.modal.help.how_to_turn_it_off.title: How do I turn off local network previews?
page.modal.help.how_to_turn_it_off.instr: If you don’t want your project preview links to appear over your local network (perhaps you’re on public Wi-Fi), you may disable this feature by opening the preview dropdown in the Cloud Editor, clicking on the headset icon, and toggling OFF Link Sharing.
page.modal.help.project_not_appearing.in: If you are experiencing network issues, you can always log into 8th Wall on your headset to open project preview links.
page.modal.help.project_not_appearing.st: Navigate to your project and open the editor
Open “Preview” and click “New Tab” to authenticate
